Off Calendar Jan-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MARRIANNE B. SIOSON of the Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen, Tel No. (415) 398-5000 appearing for the Plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS TIRSO CASTRO, CHRISTINA CASTRO, EMMANUEL CASTRO, AND ALEJANDRO CASTRO'S Motion To File First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-30-2014 Continued To Jan-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS TIRSO CASTRO, CHRISTINA CASTRO, EMMANUEL CASTRO, AND ALEJANDRO CASTRO'S Motion To File First Amended Complaint is continued to January 29, 2015 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 30, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
